prestazioni: 13B-REW (Sequential Twin-Turbo) engine rebuild with Tomei 2.2L stroker kit, forged internals (JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam rods), and HKS GT-SS turbochargers (64mm compressor, 62mm turbine) for 450whp on E85 with Haltech Elite 2500 ECU and custom 3.5" intake piping

Full custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with Fujitsubo GSpec Type-500 cat-back (2.5-inch primary tubes, 3.5-inch collector) and dual 100-cell GReddy catalytic converters for JDM compliance with 1200rpm idle burble

KW Variant 3 coilovers with custom valving for Luce-specific subframe geometry, paired with Cusco 22mm front / 19mm rear sway bars and Powerflex polybushings (front lower control arm, subframe, and differential mounts)
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber overfenders (3.5-inch flares front/rear), extended to clear 285/30R19 Toyo R888R tires on Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 wheels
Full custom front bumper with integrated 3D-printed carbon fiber splitter (2.5-inch overhang) and Mazdaspeed RX-7 FD3S-style side skirts with integrated LED turn signals (Philips Ultinon Pro9000)
Rear diffuser with integrated quad 4-inch titanium exhaust tips (Burns Stainless) and custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler (1.5-inch ducktail) with adjustable Gurney flap (AeroCatch mounts)
